message:
refactor(abi): route glibc_internal setaliasent to native endaliasent

Now that the alias family is fully native in unistd_abi, setaliasent
in glibc_internal_abi no longer needs host delegation — it simply
calls our native endaliasent to reset the iterator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
